mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (user_id, order_id, all_price, status, create_time, pay_time, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderId}, #{allPrice}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{payTime}, #{remark})

INSERT INTO order_details (order_id, dish_id, price, num, subtotal) VALUES
(#{detail.orderId}, #{detail.dishId}, #{detail.price}, #{detail.num}, #{detail.subtotal})
